## cilium-dbg statedb

Inspect StateDB

```
cilium-dbg statedb [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for statedb
  -o, --output string   Output format, one of: table, json or yaml (default "table")
  -w, --watch           Watch for changes
```
